en.extract:
The grey-eyed bulbul (Iole propinqua) is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae.
It is found in Southeast Asia in its natural habitat of subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.


Taxonomy and systematics
The grey-eyed bulbul was originally described in the genus Criniger and classified by some authorities within the genus Hypsipetes.


Subspecies
Five subspecies are currently recognized:

I. p. aquilonis - (Deignan, 1948) — southern China and north-eastern Vietnam
I. p. propinqua - (Oustalet, 1903) — from eastern Myanmar to southern China, northern Thailand and northern Indochina
I. p. simulator - (Deignan, 1948) — eastern Thailand and southern Indochina
I. p. innectens - (Deignan, 1948) — far southern Vietnam
I. p. myitkyinensis - (Deignan, 1948) — north-eastern and eastern Myanmar


References

The '''grey-eyed bulbul''' ('''''Iole propinqua''''') is a species of [[songbird]] in the [[bulbul]] family, Pycnonotidae.
It is found in Southeast Asia in its natural [[habitat]] of subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.

==Taxonomy and systematics==
The grey-eyed bulbul was originally described in the genus ''[[Criniger]]'' and classified by some authorities within the genus ''[[Hypsipetes]]''.

===Subspecies===
Five subspecies are currently recognized:<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/bulbuls/|title=Bulbuls « IOC World Bird List|website=www.worldbirdnames.org|language=en-US|access-date=2017-06-04}}</ref>

* ''I. p. aquilonis'' - <small>([[Herbert Girton Deignan|Deignan]], 1948)</small> — southern China and north-eastern Vietnam
* ''I. p. propinqua'' - <small>([[Émile Oustalet|Oustalet]], 1903)</small> — from eastern Myanmar to southern China, northern Thailand and northern [[Indochina]]
* ''I. p. simulator'' - <small>(Deignan, 1948)</small> — eastern Thailand and southern Indochina
* ''I. p. innectens'' - <small>(Deignan, 1948)</small> — far southern Vietnam
* ''I. p. myitkyinensis'' - <small>(Deignan, 1948)</small> — north-eastern and eastern Myanmar

zh.extract:
灰眼短脚鹎（学名：Iole propinqua）为鹎科Iole属的鸟类。分布于中南半岛以及中国大陆的云南、广西等地，主要生活于热带海拔1000米以下开阔的次生林、也见于山坡平坝的灌丛间以及尤喜活动于果树。该物种的模式产地在越南北部。


亚种
灰眼短脚鹎广西亚种（学名：Iole propinqua aquilonis）。分布于越南以及中国大陆的云南、广西等地。该物种的模式产地在越南北部Backan。
灰眼短脚鹎指名亚种（学名：Iole propinqua propinqua）。分布于缅甸、老挝、越南、泰国以及中国大陆的云南等地。该物种的模式产地在越南北部PaMou。
